Metadata.SimplifiedName: Batman - The Caped Crusader - The Penguin
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0634 "BATMANTHECAPEDCRUSADER-SIDE1-THEPENGUIN-0634" -Di_table_addr=0x02 -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Batman - The Caped Crusader - The Penguin.prg"
